mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.calendar_public (data_type, ymd, content) VALUES (#{dataType}, #{ymd}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, data_type, ymd, content, created_dt FROM cms.calendar_public WHERE data_type = 'Data' AND ymd BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} ORDER BY ymd ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.calendar (gubun, sorl, ymd, content) VALUES (#{gubun}, #{sorl}, #{ymd}, #{content})
